info.name: DEMS — Election Management System API
info.description:
Full API test collection for DEMS (Multi-Tenant SaaS Election Management System).

## Base URL
`{{baseUrl}}` = `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Sanctum Bearer token. Use the **Login** request first — it auto-saves the token to the `{{token}}` variable.

## Standard Response Envelope
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "...", "data": {}, "meta": {} }
```

## Roles
super_admin · org_admin · org_user · election_admin · election_user · voter · candidate

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — login, logout, password management.

request.description:
Authenticate a user and receive a Sanctum Bearer token.

**Default super admin**: `admin@dems.app` / `Admin@1234`

The test script auto-saves the token to `{{token}}`.
Revoke the current token. Requires Bearer auth.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile, roles, permissions, and organization.
Request a password reset email. Returns the same success message regardless of whether the email exists (prevents enumeration).
Reset password using the token received via email. Token expires in 60 minutes.
Set password for the first time using the setup token from the invitation email.

item.name: Public (No Auth)
item.description: Publicly accessible endpoints — no authentication required.

request.description: Paginated list of elections with publicly published results.
Full election results for a public election (posts, winners, turnout %).
List of moderators (focal points) with name, mobile, designation, and organization.
Elections that have public voter list enabled.
Voters grouped by designation for a public election.

item.name: Organizations
item.description: Organization registration, verification, and profile management.

request.description:
Register a new organization with its admin user. Creates org + admin in a transaction. Sends verification email to org and setup email to admin.

**Type enum**: `govt`, `private`, `association`, `cooperative`, `ngo`, `education`
View organization details. Org admin sees own org only; super admin sees any.
Update organization profile. Only org_admin or super_admin.

item.name: Elections
item.description: Election CRUD, status management, and feature toggles.

request.description: List elections for the current user's organization. Voters/candidates only see elections they are enrolled in.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Annual Board Election 2026",
  "description": "Election for president, secretary, and treasurer positions.",
  "election_date": "2026-06-15",
  "voting_start_time": "09:00",
  "voting_end_time": "17:00",
  "candidate_mode": "selected",
  "allow_multi_post": false
}

request.description:
Create a new election in `draft` status.

**candidate_mode**: `selected` (admin assigns candidates) or `open` (all voters are candidates).
**allow_multi_post**: If true, a candidate can run for multiple positions.
View election details with posts and organization info.
Update election. Only editable in `draft` status.
Delete an election. Returns 204 No Content.

Transition election status.

**Allowed transitions**: draft→scheduled, scheduled→active, active→completed, any→cancelled.

On `completed`: auto-publishes results and stamps `completed_at`.
Create a copy of the election with its posts (candidates are not copied). New election is in `draft` status.
Toggle `is_public_result` flag. Org admin / election admin only.
Toggle `is_public_voter_list` flag. Org admin / election admin only.

item.name: Voters
item.description: Voter management within an election — add, remove, import, export, invitations.

query.description: Search by voter name or email

request.description: Paginated list of voters for the election. Includes user details and roles.

Add a single voter to the election. Creates or finds user by email within the same organization. Assigns voter role and sends invitation email.

If `candidate_mode=open`, the voter is also assigned the candidate role.
Update voter profile details (name, mobile, office, designation).
Remove a voter from the election. Only when election is editable (draft). Returns 204.

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV. Max 5 MB. Columns: name, email, mobile, office_name, designation

request.description:
Bulk import voters from an Excel/CSV file.

**Required columns**: name, email
**Optional columns**: mobile, office_name, designation

Skips duplicates. Returns import summary with per-row errors.
Download voters as an Excel (.xlsx) file.

Copy all voters from a source election. Replace `1` in the URL with the source election ID.

Response: `{copied: N, skipped: M}`
Resend the invitation email to a single voter.

Send invitations to multiple voters. Pass `voter_ids` array, or leave empty to send to all voters.

Response: `{sent: N, failed: M}`

Toggle the moderator role on a voter. Election admin / super admin only.

Response: `{voter_id, user_id, is_moderator}`

item.name: Posts (Positions)
item.description: Manage election positions / posts (e.g. President, Secretary).

request.description: List all posts (positions) for the election, with candidate count.

Create a new position in the election.

**max_votes**: Number of candidates a voter can select for this post (default: 1).
**order**: Display order.
Update a post. Only when election is editable (draft).
Delete a post. Only when election is editable (draft). Returns 204.

item.name: Candidates
item.description: Assign or remove candidates for election posts.

request.description:
List candidates for a specific post.

In `open` mode: returns enrolled voters.
In `selected` mode: returns manually assigned candidates with bio.

Assign a candidate to a post. Only works in `selected` mode.

**Rules**:
- User must be an enrolled voter
- If `allow_multi_post=false`: user can only be candidate for 1 post
- Cannot duplicate on same post
Remove a candidate from a post. Returns 204.

item.name: Voting
item.description: Cast votes and check voting status.

request.description:
Cast votes for all posts in a single request. Atomic transaction.

**Rules**:
- Election must be `active`
- User must be enrolled voter and not already voted
- `candidate_id` refers to Candidate record ID in `selected` mode, or User ID in `open` mode
- No duplicate posts in ballot
- Each post limited to `max_votes` selections

**Rate limit**: 10 requests/minute

Check if the current user has voted in this election.

Response: `{has_voted: boolean, voted_at: datetime|null}`

item.name: Results
item.description: Election results — view, export as PDF/Excel, and candidate self-view.

request.description:
View aggregated election results: posts, winners, turnout %, vote tally, chart data.

Super admin always sees results. Others only see when `is_result_published=true`.

View your own vote tally per post (candidate role only).

Response includes: votes_received, total_votes_cast, percentage per post.
Download election results as a PDF (A4 format with winner highlighting).
Download election results as an Excel file (Summary sheet + one sheet per post).

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Dashboard statistics for org admins and super admins.

request.description: Organization dashboard: election/voter totals, participation rates, status breakdown.

Platform-wide stats: organizations, elections, voters, votes, trends, audit logs, org breakdown.

**Requires**: `super_admin` role.
Paginated list of all organizations. Super admin only.

Create an organization directly with a pre-set admin password (no setup email).

Email is auto-verified. Org and admin are active immediately.
View organization details with user/election counts.
Activate or deactivate an organization. Toggles `is_active`.

item.name: Admin — Roles & Permissions
item.description: Manage roles, permissions, and user role assignments.

request.description:
List all roles with their assigned permissions, plus the full permissions list.

**Requires**: `super_admin` role.

Sync permissions for a role. Cannot modify `super_admin` role.

**Requires**: `super_admin` role.

query.description: Required: election to list voters for

request.description:
List voters with their roles for a specific election.

**Requires**: `view-voters` permission.

Sync voter/candidate roles for a user. Voter role is always enforced. Preserves other roles.

**Requires**: `view-voters` permission.
Lightweight list of organizations `[{id, name}]` for dropdowns.
Lightweight list of elections `[{id, name, election_date, status}]` for dropdowns.

item.name: Admin — Users (Staff)
item.description: Super admin staff user management — create, update, roles, status, assigned elections.

request.description: Paginated list of staff users (excludes voter-only users). Super admin only.

Create a staff user. Password is null — a setup email is sent automatically.

**Roles**: `super_admin`, `org_admin`, `org_user`, `election_admin`, `election_user`, `moderator`

`organization_id` is required for non-super_admin roles.
Update staff user profile details.
Sync staff roles for a user. Preserves voter/candidate roles.
Activate or deactivate a user. Cannot toggle own account.
Resend the password setup email to a staff user.
Deactivate user and strip roles. Cannot delete own account. Returns 204.
View elections assigned to a staff user.
Set which elections a staff user is assigned to manage.

item.name: Moderator
item.description: Moderator endpoints — voter password resets and profile updates.

request.description:
List elections the moderator has access to.

**Requires**: `send-reset-password` permission.

query.description: Search by name, email, or mobile

request.description: List voters for a moderator's election. Searchable by name, email, or mobile.
Update voter profile details via moderator access.

Generate a password reset link for a voter. Does NOT send email — returns the link for the moderator to share.

Response: `{reset_link, voter_name}`
